title: microsoft/CogACT
abstract:
A Foundational Vision-Language-Action Model for Synergizing Cognition and Action in Robotic Manipulation

# CogACT: A Foundational Vision-Language-Action Model for Synergizing Cognition and Action in Robotic Manipulation ### 🚩[Project Page](https://cogact.github.io/) | 📑[Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.19650) | 🤗[Models](https://huggingface.co/CogACT) This is the code for CogACT: A Foundational Vision-Language-Action Model for Synergizing Cognition and Action in Robotic Manipulation. ## News - 🔥 [2024-12-23] Update new setions: [Deployment in The Real World](#deployment-in-the-real-world) and [Inference Speed](#inference-speed). It demonstrates the advantage of our approach in inference speed. - 🔥 [2024-12-01] Initial release. ## Contents * [**Installation**](#installation) * [**Getting Started**](#getting-started) * [**Fully Fine-Tuning**](#fully-fine-tuning) * [**Training CogACT from Scratch**](#training-cogact-from-scratch) * [**Evaluation in SIMPLER**](#evaluation-in-simpler) * [**Deployment in The Real World**](#deployment-in-the-real-world) * [**Inference Speed**](#inference-speed) ## Installation The code is built using Python 3.10, and can be run under any environment with Python 3.8 and above. We require PyTorch >= 2.2.0 and CUDA >= 12.0 (It may run with lower versions, but we have not tested it). We recommend using [Miniconda](https://docs.conda.io/en/latest/miniconda.html) and setting up an environment: Next, clone our repo and install the required packages: If you need to use the traning code, please also install the [Flash Attention](https://github.com/Dao-AILab/flash-attention). You can simply run (The first run might take a bit longer): or install it manually: ## Getting Started We release three CogACT models with different model sizes, including [Small](https://huggingface.co/CogACT/CogACT-Small), [Base](https://huggingface.co/CogACT/CogACT-Base) and [Large](https://huggingface.co/CogACT/CogACT-Large). Checkpoints, configs, and model cards are availabel on [Hugging Face page](https://huggingface.co/CogACT). Refer to the code below for the minimal infer
abstract_zh: CogACT是一种基础视觉-语言-行动模型，旨在协同机器人操作中的认知与行动。该模型通过整合视觉、语言和行动信息，实现了高效的机器人操控。实验表明，CogACT在多个基准测试中表现出色，尤其在推理速度上具有优势。代码和模型已开源。
tldr_zh: CogACT是一种协同认知与行动的机器人操作基础模型。
cover_zh: 机器人操作新突破｜CogACT让认知与行动完美协同

judge.reason: 官方VLA模型，融合视觉语言与动作，提供代码、模型和真实部署，方向吻合。

>[!abstract] 一句话总结：提出CogACT，一种基础视觉-语言-动作模型，利用预训练视觉语言提取特征，并通过条件扩散模型逐级生成机器人动作序列，融合认知推理与动作执行。


# 一、动机

> 现有视觉-语言-动作模型在动作生成上效率低、精度不足，CogACT通过将扩散过程与视觉语言模型结合，实现更精确和高效的动作生成。


# 二、方法

> 提出CogACT，一种基础视觉-语言-动作模型，利用预训练视觉语言提取特征，并通过条件扩散模型逐级生成机器人动作序列，融合认知推理与动作执行。


# 三、核心实验结果

> 在SIMPLER基准测试中，CogACT-Large模型在多个任务上取得最先进平均成功率（例如推方块任务92%），相比之前最佳VLA模型提升约12个百分点。


# 四、对我的启发

> 局限在于训练计算成本高和扩散推理速度慢；启发是扩散策略可有效提升VLA模型的动作精度，为机器人操作任务提供了新范式。
